app_category_descriptions.ai: AI apps for assistants, simulations, and creative thinking.
app_category_descriptions.all: Every routable Tuturuuu app available from this launcher.
app_category_descriptions.content: Content apps for publishing, files, and delivery.
app_category_descriptions.core: Core entrypoints for the Tuturuuu workspace platform.
app_category_descriptions.developer: Developer utilities, gateways, and technical tools.
app_category_descriptions.learning: Learning apps for courses, practice, and teaching.
app_category_descriptions.miscellaneous: Miscellaneous apps for docs, utilities, and public shortcuts.
app_category_descriptions.operations: Operations apps for money, inventory, and commerce.
app_category_descriptions.productivity: Productivity apps for schedule, tasks, messages, and meetings.

app_descriptions.apps: Browse and launch every app available in your workspace.
app_descriptions.calendar: Plan schedules, events, and shared availability.
app_descriptions.chat: Message teammates and keep workspace conversations together.
app_descriptions.cms: Create and publish structured content for sites and products.
app_descriptions.contacts: Organize customers, members, and relationship history.
app_descriptions.docs: Read product guides, references, and setup instructions.
app_descriptions.drive: Store, organize, and share workspace files.
app_descriptions.finance: Manage wallets, transactions, invoices, and budgets.
app_descriptions.forms: Build, share, and analyze workspace forms and their responses.
app_descriptions.hive: Explore collaborative simulations and spatial experiences.
app_descriptions.inventory: Manage products, stock, purchasing, and sales.
app_descriptions.learn: Follow courses, assignments, and learning progress.
app_descriptions.mail: Read and send workspace email from one inbox.
app_descriptions.meet: Schedule meetings and find a time that works for everyone.
app_descriptions.mind: Build mind maps and connect ideas with AI.
app_descriptions.nova: Create and solve prompt-driven AI challenges.
app_descriptions.pay: Manage billing, subscriptions, and payment activity.
app_descriptions.platform: Manage your workspace, settings, and the full Tuturuuu platform.
app_descriptions.rewise: Practice, review, and retain knowledge with AI.
app_descriptions.shortener: Create compact links and manage redirects.
app_descriptions.storefront: Sell products through a customer-facing online store.
app_descriptions.tasks: Plan projects, assign work, and track progress.
app_descriptions.teach: Plan courses, manage classes, and support learners.
app_descriptions.tools: Open focused utilities for QR codes and quick tasks.
app_descriptions.track: Record time and understand where work goes.

inspector.empty: Select a node, relationship, group, or cluster to inspect its details.

smartPrompts.actions: For node "{title}" ({id}), status {status}, horizon {horizon}, propose an applyable draft that turns this idea into actionable child nodes with clear statuses, dependencies, and next steps. Use the node body as context: {body}
smartPrompts.elaborate: Elaborate node "{title}" ({id}), status {status}, horizon {horizon}, into smaller connected idea nodes. Smartly determine the right timeframe for each child, preserve the parent relationship, color-code the structure, and propose an applyable draft patch. Node body: {body}
smartPrompts.expandSystem: Treat node "{title}" ({id}) as the seed of a larger planning system. Inspect nearby graph context, identify missing branches, milestones, risks, review points, and actionable follow-ups, then propose an applyable draft patch with sensible statuses and horizons. Current status: {status}. Current horizon: {horizon}. Node body: {body}
smartPrompts.milestones: For node "{title}" ({id}), status {status}, horizon {horizon}, propose an applyable draft that adds concrete milestones, review checkpoints, success criteria, and any supporting relationships needed to track progress. Node body: {body}
smartPrompts.refine: Refine node "{title}" ({id}) by deduplicating overlaps, improving wording, clarifying relationships, and proposing any needed child nodes or relationship rewrites as an applyable draft. Status: {status}. Horizon: {horizon}. Body: {body}
smartPrompts.refineEdge: Inspect relationship {edgeId} from "{source}" ({sourceId}) to "{target}" ({targetId}). Current type: {edgeType}. Current label: {label}. Decide whether this should be a parent-child, sequence, dependency, blocker, support, reference, or loose relation, then propose an applyable draft with any needed edge type, label, source, target, or parent updates.
smartPrompts.relationshipPass: Run a relationship clarity pass for board "{board}" with {nodes} nodes and {edges} edges. Inspect the graph, identify parent-child structure, same-level sequence, dependencies, blockers, supports, and loose relations. Propose an applyable draft that rewrites confusing links, labels important edges, groups children under parents, and removes redundant relationship noise.
smartPrompts.relationships: For node "{title}" ({id}), analyze its relationship structure. Incoming: {incoming}. Outgoing: {outgoing}. Related nodes: {related}. Status: {status}. Horizon: {horizon}. Body: {body}. Propose an applyable draft that clarifies parent-child placement, same-level links, dependencies, blockers, and support edges around this node.
smartPrompts.rewireEdge: Find a better placement for relationship {edgeId}. Current source: "{source}" ({sourceId}); target: "{target}" ({targetId}); type: {edgeType}; label: {label}. Inspect nearby graph context and propose an applyable draft to rewire or relabel it if that improves the plan.
smartPrompts.risks: Analyze node "{title}" ({id}) for blockers, weak assumptions, missing dependencies, review needs, and decision points. Propose an applyable draft that adds risk, question, dependency, and action nodes with appropriate statuses. Status: {status}. Horizon: {horizon}. Body: {body}
